title: The Lion King
desc: Simba, a young lion prince, flees his kingdom after the murder of his father, Mufasa. Years later, a chance encounter with Nala, a lioness, causes him to return and take back what is rightfully his.

title: Jumanji
desc: While playing a board game, two children release a man who has been trapped in it for years and the dangers that come with him.

title: Kingdom Of The Planet Of The Apes
desc: In a distant future, warring apes seek human tech while one enslaves others; a freedom-seeking ape partners with a young human woman with her own aims.

title: The Predator
desc: Quinn McKenna, an army sniper, along with some fugitives and a scientist, sets out to kill the Predator and save Rory, his son, who was abducted as his autism reflects advancement in human evolution.

title: Baywatch
desc: Action comedy with Dwayne Johnson and Zac Efron. Devoted lifeguard Mitch Buchannan butts heads with a brash new recruit.

title: Cosmoball
desc: Earth's moon destroyed; Cosmoball spaceship hovers.

title: Ride On
desc: Luo, a retired stuntman, tries to save his horse from debt collectors with his daughter's help. Their fight goes viral, making Luo and Red Hare online stars.
